news.t: The Best Tech ETFs to Buy
Charts Suggest Global Tech Stocks Are Headed Higher
Charts Suggest Trend Traders Will Be Buying Tech Stocks

holdings.infoBox: IXN is an equity ETF with a total of 144 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.79%, Apple at 10.11%, Microsoft at 6.86%, Micron Technology at 4.62%, and Samsung Electronics at 4.41%.

overview.description: The iShares Global Tech ETF (IXN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of global technology stocks. IXN was launched on Nov 12, 2001 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: S&P Global 1200 Information Technology 4.5/22.5/45 Capped Index

data.title: The Best Tech ETFs to Buy
data.text: Tech ETFs can deliver superb tax efficiency and growth potential, but investors must be aware of high volatility, concentration risk and stretched valuations.

data.title: Charts Suggest Global Tech Stocks Are Headed Higher
data.text: Global technology companies have been empowering new ways of working, and investors are taking note.

data.title: Charts Suggest Trend Traders Will Be Buying Tech Stocks
data.text: Long-term trendlines on the charts of major global tech stocks suggest that the uptrend is set to continue and the recent pullback could be presenting traders with a buying opportunity.
